summary: Tested startup stability fix for SentCom AI trading platform. The fix implements sequential health checks in StartupModal and safePolling utility across 17+ polling intervals. Backend APIs respond correctly. Frontend loads with startup modal showing sequential service checks. No ERR_INSUFFICIENT_RESOURCES errors detected during testing.

details: Services check sequentially (Backend API, WebSocket, Database, IB Gateway, Live Scanner, AI Assistant, AI Predictions, Learning Engine)
Each service has data-testid='startup-service-{id}' for testing
Get Started button (data-testid='get-started-btn') enables when required services are ready
Implements random stagger (0-3s) to prevent thundering herd
Tab visibility awareness - skips polls when tab is hidden
Essential flag for critical polling that continues during training mode
Queues excess requests to prevent ERR_INSUFFICIENT_RESOURCES
App loads correctly when startup modal is bypassed (localStorage 'tradecommand_skip_startup' = 'true')
Command Center page renders with SentCom, Background Jobs, Bot Performance, Live Scanner Alerts
No ERR_INSUFFICIENT_RESOURCES errors in console logs
/api/ib/status - Returns connection status (IB Gateway offline as expected)

critical_code_review_comments: safePolling utility correctly implements staggered polling with globalStaggerCounter for deterministic spread
StartupModal performs sequential health checks with 500ms delay between each service check
RequestThrottler limits concurrent requests to 4 to prevent connection pool exhaustion
App.js properly gates main content rendering behind appReady state which is set after startup modal completes

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Startup modal and main app load correctly, no ERR_INSUFFICIENT_RESOURCES errors)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Startup stability fix verified. Key test: set localStorage 'tradecommand_skip_startup' to 'true' to bypass startup modal and test main app. StartupModal performs sequential health checks with 500ms delays. safePolling utility adds random 0-3s stagger to polling intervals. IB Gateway is expected to be offline in test environment. No ERR_INSUFFICIENT_RESOURCES errors should appear in console.
screenshots: .screenshots/01_startup_modal.png - StartupModal initial state showing services pending
.screenshots/05_main_app_initial.png - Main app loaded after bypassing startup
.screenshots/06_command_center_loaded.png - Command Center with SentCom, Background Jobs, Bot Performance
